data.name: Bouncing Agency
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Bouncing Agency, the game where you can become the successful manager of your own bouncing empire!



In this game, you will have to scout, hire, and train models who want to make it big in the sexy world of bouncing.
You will also have to deal with your own personal life and relationships with boucing models.



Interact with various characters with their own personalities and stories.
Improve your models daily to unlock new features, events, and ultimately, the contest.



Level up your models through mini-games.



This game is an adult visual novel with fully animated characters.

And win the contest!
data.about_the_game:
Welcome to Bouncing Agency, the game where you can become the successful manager of your own bouncing empire!

You will also have to deal with your own personal life and relationships with boucing models.



Interact with various characters with their own personalities and stories.
Improve your models daily to unlock new features, events, and ultimately, the contest.



Level up your models through mini-games.



This game is an adult visual novel with fully animated characters.

And win the contest!
data.short_description: Become the most influential agent of bouncing models ! Have you always dreamed of creating the most prestigious modelling agency in the world specialized in buxom women? Now's your chance!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 簡體中文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 64bit
  • 處理器: 2.0Ghz Quad core Intel or AMD CPU
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0Ghz Dual core Intel CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0Ghz Dual core Intel CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
